name: Beef Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Sauté the onion until softened.
3. Add the red bell pepper and mushroom to the skillet; cook until tender.
4. Stir in the walnuts and continue cooking until all vegetables are well combined.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, bread crumbs, parsley, thyme, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over one side of the butterflied tenderloin.
7. Place about eight strings around the stuffing to hold it in place along the edge of the beef.
8. Roll up the tenderloin tightly with the stuffing inside; secure with the strings.
9. In a small bowl, combine red wine and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
10. Brush the filet with the wine mixture.
11. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
12. Roast the beef for 10 minutes at 425°F (220°C), then reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and roast for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the filet reads 160°F (71°C).
13. Remove the meat from the oven and let it rest for about 10 minutes before slicing.
